violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (potato slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Item cleaned and sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The grease receptacle outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Slab has been built and grease receptable will be re-located when emptied. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025
A wiping cloth was observed on the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
Molluscan Shellfish tags did not have all of the required information. Date of last shellfish used was lacking. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (vegetables/cheeses) in the prep unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Staff relocated eggs. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (potato slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Potato slicer was brought to dish washer to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

Soup, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
Roasted peppers were observed with date mark exceeding 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per inspector observation and interview of staff, multiple foods (rice, beef sauce, soup) were placed hot in the walk-in refrigerator in plastic containers greater than four inches deep. Inspector discussed cooling methods with staff and PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the stand mixer and slicer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025

The cardboard dumpster and grease receptacle outside are located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2024
Ice accumulation was observed on pipes and floor of the walk-in freezer. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025
Various areas of the kitchen floor are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

The cardboard dumpster and the grease recycling bin outside are located on dirt and gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024

The kitchen ceiling tiles have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024
The pass-thru shelf in the steam table area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024
The drainiage pipe in the walk in freezer is in poor repair, creating an ice build-up. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024
The floor in the kitchen is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025
The new slicer has unsealed gaps between pieces of metal and exposed hardware, impacting its ability to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the area beneath flattop grill and the mixer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024

The cardboard dumpster and the grease recycling bin outside are located on dirt and gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024

The area outside the kitchen door has an accumulation of leaf litter, debris, buckets, shelves, etc.. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items (chest freezer) was observed in the storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024
The ceiling in the back alley storage area is in poor repair, with exposed spun insulation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

The kitchen ceiling tiles have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024
The pass-thru shelf in the steam table area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024
The floor in the kitchen area in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024
The drainage pipe in the walk in freezer is in poor repair, creating an ice build-up. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024
The weather strip on the kitchen door is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and vegetable slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

PIC stated breading mixes for chicken and fish is reused after sifting. Breading mixes for chicken and fish must be disposed of after 4 hours. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

Pooled eggs, peeled eggs, cheese, and cut lettuce observed held at 53 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024
Turkey, pasta, and grapenut pudding observed with date marks exceeding 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

Deli meats observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Chowder was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Meatloaf was observed cooling on counter where parameters for proper cooling would not be met without intervention. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

Thermometers are lacking in two refrigeration units. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024

Working containers of some dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024
Food observed stored on the floor in the walk in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. The water used to store utensils must be at least 135 degrees F. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

Utensils in the bar are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

Water observed in the food processor bowl, and numerous stacked plastic food containers. After cleaning & sanitizing, equipment and utensils must be air dried. An air drying rack is required for proper air drying. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in areas of the kitchen and server area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024
Establishment is reusing single-use items for food preparation and storage.Single-use items shall not be reused. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

The salad bar cold hold unit was not in good repair, not holding food at 41 degrees F or colder.No foods requiring refrigeration are to be stored in the salad bar unit until it has been serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

The slicer was not in good repair, with the seal degrading and missing in some areas, an area beneath the blade rusted, and some of the prongs on the grip worn.Slicer must be removed from the premises.The slicer New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

A plastic-coated strainer, plastic food containers, large mixing bowl, and ice cream scoop were not in good repair, impacting their ability to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris:sandwich unitpizza ovenarea beneath flattop grillfreezer refrigeratorsutensil storage rackdry storage rackequipment tablecan opener and basefloor mixerice machinewalk in refrigerator racksfood processor basesalad bar cold hold unit New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

The cardboard dumpster and the grease recycling unit outside are located on dirt and gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024
The grease recycling unit has a heavy accumulation of grease and debris.Grease recycling bin must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024

The area outside the kitchen door has an accumulation of leaf litter, debris, buckets, racks, etc. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in areas of the kitchen. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024
The pressed fiberboard shelf in the condiment refilling area is in poor pair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024
The covering on ducts in the back dry storage area is in poor repair, exposing spun insulation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024

The pass-thru shelf in the steam table area is in poor repair, with gaps between wood, and chipped paint. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024
The floors in the kitchen are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

The ceiling tiles in the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and dried liquid. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024

The walk in fan covers, fan soffit, and ceiling have an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in areas of the kitchen. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024
